title: Senior Teacher - NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited:
NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited!
